---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why is it useful?**
How would this help you or others using Quartier?

**Which module does it affect?**
- [ ] prospect/ (finding businesses)
- [ ] scraper/ (downloading websites)
- [ ] generate/ (creating redesigns)
- [ ] tools/ (optimization, validation)
- [ ] templates/ (legal pages)
- [ ] Other

**Anything else?**
Screenshots, links, or examples that help explain the idea.
